what_it_tests: Whether the system retrieves stories about exclusion and erasure in educational settings.
Whether the system retrieves stories about speaking up and self-advocacy.
Whether the system connects identity language with belonging and community.
Whether the system retrieves education resource stories without requiring exact keywords.
Whether the system retrieves care and sustained presence themes.
Whether the system captures social misrecognition and stereotyping.
Whether the system retrieves leadership and support passages.
